name: Spicy Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and both types of brown sugar until smooth.
2. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and stir well.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the flour, soda, baking powder, cinnamon, and ginger.
4. Gradually mix the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until fully combined.
5. Gently fold in the sliced apples.
6. Pour the batter into a greased pie tin.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes, or until the cake starts to pull away from the edge of the pan.
8. Allow to cool before serving.
